agents.description: An agent watches a search in a map area and notifies you when matching free stuff appears nearby.

app.name: saysheep

new.location.tap_map: Tap the map to move the pin and set the location

new.need_pickup_code: Preparing your pickup code — try again in a second.

Pickup Verification Code: {code}

Give this 12-digit code to the taker when they pick up the item. They will enter it to mark the item as taken.
new.title: title (optional)
notfound.title: nothing here
report.heading: report content
report.illegal_notice: If you believe this content is illegal, please report it directly to the national tipline or appropriate authority. In Denmark, you can submit reports at politi.dk.
settings.heading: settings
settings.identity.export_warning: ⚠️ keep your private key safe — it proves you posted items
settings.identity.invalid_key: private key must be a 64-character hex string
settings.identity.passkey_desc: add an extra layer of biometric security to gate access to viewing or exporting your private key in settings (does not encrypt local storage).
settings.identity.passkey_unsupported: webauthn is not supported by this browser.
settings.notifications.denied: notifications blocked — allow in browser settings
settings.notifications.unsupported: notifications not supported in this browser

notif.title: notifications
notif.welcome: 👋 Welcome to saysheep! Tap to learn how it works.
onboarding.title: welcome to saysheep 🐺
onboarding.intro: saysheep helps you give away and find free stuff nearby — no accounts, no money, no tracking.
onboarding.step.give: 🎁 Give away: tap “give away”, snap a photo, add tags, and post it. Neighbours see it right away.
onboarding.step.find: 🔍 Find: browse free stuff on the map or in the list — both views show the same items.
onboarding.step.take: 🤝 Take it: arrange pickup in the item chat. The giver shares a 12-digit code you enter to mark the item taken.
onboarding.step.privacy: 🔒 Private & offline-first: your identity is a key kept only on your device. saysheep syncs peer-to-peer and over open relays, and keeps working offline.
list.filter_hint: Results from the current map view and these search terms:
settings.install.ios_hint: On iPhone/iPad: tap the Share button, then “Add to Home Screen”.
onboarding.step.filter: 🎯 Filter: results are everything inside your current map view AND matching your search words. Pan or zoom to change the area, type words to narrow it — the two filters combine.
onboarding.step.agents: 🤖 Save a search: tap the robot next to the search box to save the current map area + words as an agent and get notified when matching items appear.
onboarding.install.title: 📲 Install the app
messages.title: messages
messages.empty: no messages yet — say hi on an item to start a chat
messages.start_hint: no messages yet — send the first one
messages.item_gone: this item is no longer available
messages.block_confirm: Block this person? You won’t see their messages or listings anymore.
agents.no_matches: no matches yet — they’ll appear here
settings.install.sideload_warning:
Android will show a security warning because this app is installed directly (not from the Play Store).

After downloading:
1. Tap the downloaded file
2. If you see "Blocked by Play Protect", tap "More details" → "Install anyway"
3. You may need to allow installs from your browser in Settings → Apps → Install unknown apps

This is normal for apps distributed outside the Play Store.

Continue with download?
settings.install.sideload_hint: You may need to tap "More details" → "Install anyway" when Android's Play Protect shows a warning.
settings.update.title: Update available
settings.update.body: A new version ({version}) is available. Download and install it to get the latest features and fixes.
notif.update: 🆕 saysheep {version} is available — update in Settings
settings.wifidirect.description: Connects directly to nearby Android devices over Wi-Fi without internet. Enables offline sharing at events, campsites, and other areas without connectivity.
settings.wifidirect.permission_denied: permission denied — allow in system settings
